title: Alexanarch External-Metadata Sidecar
description: Per-deposit external-metadata sidecar. One file per deposit at /data/external-metadata/AXN-NNNN.json. THIN INDEX format — the sidecar maps each of the deposit's legacy Zenodo DOIs to its identifier in each bulk data store (data/openalex-severed-recovery.json, data/zenodo-xml-pretermination-2026-06-07.tar.gz, data/datacite-full-backup.json, data/datacite-survivors-multi-heteronym.json). The sidecar does NOT duplicate the source records. Small useful fields (title, publication_date, abstract_chars) are inlined under per_doi for quick rendering. Sidecars are pointed at by registry.deposits[*].external_metadata_path and may be added, replaced, or removed without altering the deposit's canonical bytes (AXN hash).

axn.description: Canonical AXN v2 of the deposit this sidecar belongs to. Must match registry.deposits[*].axn.

zenodo_dois_covered.description: All legacy Zenodo DOIs covered by this sidecar. Mirrors registry.deposits[*].zenodo_dois.

severance_status.description: Net severance status across all covered DOIs. severed = scrubbed from DataCite REST; anonymized = creator metadata replaced with institutional name; retained = still surfaces under heteronym/ORCID search; post_window = minted after 2026-06-07 bulk-export snapshot; typo_immunity = escaped severance because creator name has a typo; mixed = different status per DOI.

sources.description: Per-data-store INDEX. Sidecars do not duplicate the source records themselves; the records live in the data stores under data/. Each subkey describes one store, its lookup pattern, and which of this deposit's DOIs are present in it.

data_store.description: Path to bulk OpenAlex data store, typically /data/openalex-severed-recovery.json

per_doi.description: Per-DOI dereferenceable map. Keys are Zenodo DOIs. Values include identifiers in each data store (openalex_id, zenodo_bulk_xml_entry, datacite_*_present) plus small inlined fields for quick rendering (title, publication_date, abstract_chars).
